title: Typed Array
description: Enforce type consistency in lists by declaring arrays that only accept specific data types.
problemStatement:
Homogeneous lists! Declare a variable `scores` as an array of numbers and initialize it with `[85, 90, 95]`.

**Requirement:** Use the `type[]` syntax.
hints: You can also use `Array<number>`, but `number[]` is more common and shorter.
